name: hb_3_28
requirements: As part of your analysis, over 2025-07-01 to 2025-07-15 compute and store: total_flue_gas_jiujiang (Qian'an Jiujiang Wire Rod), total_flue_gas_shougang (Shougang Qian'an Steel), combined_total_flue_gas (float), district_mean_aqi, district_max_aqi (Qian'an District, float).

turns.query: Evaluate the cumulative impact of two major steel enterprises in Qian'an: Qian'an Jiujiang Wire Rod and Shougang Qian'an Steel on Qian'an District air quality during 2025-07-01 to 2025-07-15.
